rulings.Case Title: FREDRICK J. SMITH et al VS. CRANE CO.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Mo & Mo To Quash Summons
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 29, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 5. Specially appearing defendant F.G. Norman & Sons¿ motion to quash summons is granted. Assuming without deciding that both CCP § 416.10 and CCP § 416.20 are not mutually exclusive and could both apply to a suspended corporation, plaintiffs¿ service on Ms. Norman failed to meet the requirements of either section. Corporations Code § 2011(b), cited in CCP § 416.20(b), is inapplicable because that section pertains exclusively to dissolved corporations. A suspended corporation does not, merely by virtue of its suspension and subsequent inactivity, become a dissolved corporation. There is no evidence that F.G. Norman & Sons is a dissolved corporation. = (220/HEK)
